prompt: Create a PRD for adding saved searches with email alerts to this application. Users should be able to save a search, choose how often they want updates, and manage existing alerts from their account area.
assertions: The workflow launches multiple code-explorer subagents with distinct lenses before writing the PRD.
The workflow performs targeted research from official sources before recording implementation decisions.
The workflow asks one user question at a time and includes a recommended answer for each question.
The final PRD follows the required template and includes a GitHub issue title/body plus the intended gh issue create command for offline filing.
Implementation decisions cite durable codebase patterns or official research links without including specific file paths.
